visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with a grey newsboy cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt stands in a bright studio environment with a light grey background. He points directly at the camera with an energetic expression and moving lips. (2) He begins gesturing with his hands as a detailed product chart for the Redmi Note 13 series appears on the left side of the screen. (3) The scene cuts to a closer shot of the man as he continues to talk, and the graphic switches to the HTC U23 Pro price chart. (4) A yellow-themed graphic for the realme 11 series replaces the previous one while the man continues his presentation with enthusiastic hand movements. (5) He introduces the vivo Y36, accompanied by a blue-and-white data table overlay showing various price points. (6) The man gestures toward a new green-themed list for the OPPO A78 series, maintaining a friendly and engaged facial expression. (7) He presents the Samsung A series list, specifically highlighting the A15 and A54 models with his hands as the graphic displays. (8) The man concludes the video by talking directly to the viewer with open palms, and a final banner message appears at the bottom of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥. @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 普發一萬. (2) [Subtitle]: 怎麼花最划算?. [Variety]: (你想好了嗎). (3) [Subtitle]: 這裡我綜合了通路上幾款萬元內就能入手的. (4) [Slogan]: 想換手機看這裡!. (5) [Subtitle]: 高性價比的 5G 手機. (6) [Subtitle]: 幫長輩換手機正是時候. (7) [Subtitle]: 紅米 Note 13 只要 $5,490 元. (8) [Subtitle]: 最便宜的 5G 入門機之一. (9) [Subtitle]: HTC U23 Pro 原價要 1 萬 7. (10) [Subtitle]: 現在通路特價只要 $6,490 元. (11) [Variety]: CP 值爆表. (12) [Subtitle]: realme 11 優惠價 $9,990. (13) [Subtitle]: 效能均勻. (14) [Subtitle]: 通路還抽那個東京來回的 5 天 4 夜. (15) [Subtitle]: vivo Y36 只要 $5,590. (16) [Subtitle]: 小資族首選. (17) [Subtitle]: OPPO 的 A78 $6,090. (18) [Variety]: 輕巧好握. (19) [Subtitle]: 三星的超值 A 系列. (20) [Subtitle]: A15 最低 $5,190 元. (21) [Subtitle]: 也是有夠便宜. (22) [Subtitle]: 我這邊最推薦的是 A54. (23) [Subtitle]: $9,990 元就可以入手. (24) [Variety]: 萬元封頂超有感. (25) [Subtitle]: 當然通路上不只有我說的這幾款萬元以內的手機. (26) [Subtitle]: 你還可以到各通路網站多看看!. [Slogan]: 祝福大家找到理想手機!

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, a beaded bracelet on his right wrist, and a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, bright studio with a uniform light grey/lavender background and soft lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male narrator speaks with high energy and clarity in Traditional Chinese. A fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop BGM starts immediately with a strong 4/4 beat. (2) A synthesized 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the first graphic appears. The narrator's pitch is slightly elevated to convey excitement. (3) A sharp 'pop' sound effect occurs every time a new phone brand or price table is mentioned. The BGM maintains a steady, driving rhythm. (4) The narrator increases his vocal intensity when mentioning specific low price points. The spectral brightness of the track is high, typical of polished digital media. (5) The narration continues without significant pauses between phrases. Digital 'ding' sound effects punctuate the transition between different brand sections. (6) The video ends with a final enthusiastic call to action from the speaker, followed by a quick musical tail and a silent cutoff.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed as a shopping recommendation guide to help viewers choose budget-friendly 5G smartphones priced under 10,000 TWD. By leveraging a well-known tech influencer, the content highlights specific discounted models and price points available at retail channels to drive purchase intent.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter explicitly lists prices and mentions retailer-specific discounts and travel giveaways.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media tech review format with high-density captions and synchronized sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
